violations.description: Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. - Need for Chlorine.
Handwashing lavatories. — --- Hand wash sink not working properly- repair needed.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. - Cloth found without sanitizer bucket
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. - Found not in correct order
